description: CompositionBlack filled jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck with a zipper and press button closure, long sleeves with adidas patented 3-Stripes along the shoulder and sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, zippered pockets on the left chest and sides of the waist, and a heat transfered logo on the left chestFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this filled jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your healthy runs in the winter chill . Team it with adidas sports shoes and cap for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
